auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Configure how users authenticate to this application.
auth.databaseModeDesc: Users are stored in the application's database with encrypted passwords.
auth.linuxModeDesc: Users authenticate using their Linux system credentials (PAM).
auth.adminUsersDesc: Comma-separated list of Linux usernames that will have admin privileges.
auth.infoDatabase: Database mode: Users must be manually registered by an admin.
auth.infoLinux: Linux PAM mode: Users log in with their existing Linux username and password. Each user gets their home directory as workspace.

users.title: Users
users.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
users.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
users.pamModeDesc: Users are managed by the Linux system. Users are automatically created on first login. You can enable/disable users but cannot delete them. To add admins, configure in Authentication settings.

uiSettings.title: UI Settings
uiSettings.logoHint: Recommended size: 32x32 to 64x64 pixels. Supports PNG, JPG, SVG.
uiSettings.allowedProvidersDescription: Control which AI providers users can select in the provider dropdown. At least one provider must be enabled.
